description_long: This is an ornate Victorian-style armchair featuring a rich, reddish-burgundy upholstered seat and backrest, accented with deep button tufting on the backrest. The frame is crafted from carved wood, displaying intricate detailing along the crest rail and arm supports. The armrests are partially upholstered and adorned with decorative metal studs, which also outline the seat and backrest edges. The seat cushion shows visible signs of wear and discoloration, suggesting age or frequent use. The back of the chair is smoothly upholstered without tufting, framed by the same carved wood. The legs are elegantly curved in a cabriole style, matching the overall antique aesthetic.
description: A Victorian-style armchair with burgundy tufted upholstery, carved wooden frame, and decorative metal studs. The seat shows signs of wear, and the legs are elegantly curved.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted backrest, worn seat cushion, and ornate wooden frame with metal studs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved wooden armrest, partially upholstered arm, and the cabriole leg profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, un-tufted back upholstery framed by carved wood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest, seat, and leg curvature.
attribute_armrest_design: wooden and curved with partial upholstery and metal stud accents
attribute_backrest_style: high, rounded, and deeply tufted with decorative wood crest
